posts.title: Company News
posts.excerpt: Company updates for oilfield spare parts sourcing, quotation communication and export packaging support.

posts.title: Iraq Drilling Tenders Show Demand for Hydraulic and Pneumatic Rig Spare Parts
posts.excerpt: Iraq drilling tenders show procurement demand for rig spare parts, hydraulic and pneumatic systems, power tong spares, valves, hoses and seals.

posts.title: UAE Drilling and Oilfield Services Contracts Drive Spare Parts Demand
posts.excerpt: UAE drilling and oilfield services activity creates procurement demand for mud pump parts, hydraulic components, valves, seals and pressure-control spare parts.

posts.title: F1600 Mud Pump Spare Parts Selection Support
posts.excerpt: Pratt Oil shares F1600 mud pump spare parts selection support for liners, pistons, valves, seats, rods, seals and fluid end components matched by model, drawing

posts.title: Fast-Wearing Oilfield Parts and Drilling Consumables for Desert Operations
posts.excerpt: Common consumables for oilfield equipment maintenance, including seals, gaskets, brake parts, valves, seats and hydraulic maintenance parts.

posts.title: Industry News for Oilfield Spare Parts Buyers
posts.excerpt: Industry notes for Middle East oilfield spare parts buyers, including mud pump consumables, drilling consumables and maintenance parts.

posts.title: Middle East Oilfield Spare Parts Inquiry Support
posts.excerpt: Jinan Prite Petroleum Equipment supports buyers who send part number, pump model, rig model, product photo or technical drawing for quotation.

posts.title: Saudi and GCC Rig Activity Keeps Fast-Wearing Drilling Consumables in Focus
posts.excerpt: Saudi and GCC rig activity supports procurement of mud pump liners, pistons, valves, seats, brake parts, seals and drilling maintenance consumables.

posts.title: Oilfield Equipment Spare Parts Sourcing Support
posts.excerpt: Jinan Prite Petroleum Equipment supports oilfield equipment spare parts sourcing for mud pumps, drilling rigs, workover equipment, wellhead tools, valves and hy

posts.title: Export Packaging and Quotation Support for Oilfield Spare Parts
posts.excerpt: Oilfield spare parts can be quoted according to model, drawing, quantity and delivery destination, with export packaging support for overseas buyers.

site.company: Jinan Prite Petroleum Equipment Co., Ltd.
site.tagline: Professional supplier of oil drilling equipment and spare parts for international oil and gas markets.
site.address: Building 11, Zhigu Industrial Park, High-tech Zone, Jinan, Shandong, CN
site.heroTitle: Oilfield Equipment Spare Parts Supplier for Middle East Drilling Operations
site.heroSubtitle: Mud pump parts, drilling rig spare parts, drawworks brake systems, wellhead tools, valves and hydraulic components.
